message:
test(bundle): add AddError and FileCount tests

Add tests for previously uncovered Manifest methods:
- TestManifest_AddError: verifies error accumulation (2 cases)
- TestManifest_FileCount: table-driven test with 3 cases (empty, single, multiple)

Coverage improvement: internal/bundle 58.6% → 59.2%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
